name: Preferred Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, home loans, real estate financing, and mobile banking. Ranked in Forbes Top 100 and S&P Global Top 50 performing banks.
description_long:
Preferred Bank is a full-service financial institution that has been serving its community for over 30 years. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection for customer funds. In 2025, Preferred Bank was recognized as one of America's Best Banks by Forbes and ranked among S&P Global's Top 50 Best Performing Banks in the U.S., indicating strong operational performance and customer satisfaction metrics.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products for both personal and business customers. Personal services include multiple standard checking account options, home loans through their Preferred Home Loans division, and mobile banking via their dedicated app. For business customers, Preferred Bank provides commercial checking accounts, commercial loans, commercial deposits, SBA lending programs, and real estate and construction financing. Additional features include remote deposit capture technology for business users, check ordering services, fraud protection resources, and Zelle money transfer integration.

Preferred Bank distinguishes itself through expanded FDIC deposit insurance protection offerings beyond standard coverage limits, positioning itself as security-focused for depositors. The bank emphasizes convenience through multiple banking channels—traditional branches, mobile app access, and business automation tools like remote deposit capture. Their focus on real estate lending, construction financing, and SBA lending demonstrates specialization in small business and real estate markets. The bank actively promotes security awareness with dedicated resources for identifying banking scammers.

While the website highlights strong credentials and broad service offerings, specific details about interest rates, fees, minimum balances, and loan terms are not disclosed in the available content. Customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit detailed product pages to compare competitive rates and complete feature specifications. The bank's strength appears centered on established reputation and regulatory standing rather than being a fintech disruptor. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal standard checking accounts with multiple account types
Business checking accounts for commercial customers
Home purchase and refinance loans through Preferred Home Loans
Real estate and construction financing for commercial properties
SBA lending and small business loan programs
Commercial deposits and cash management services
Mobile banking app with check deposit, balance alerts, and Zelle transfers
Remote deposit capture software for business users
Fraud detection and scam prevention resources
Online account access and digital banking platform
pros: FDIC-insured with expanded deposit insurance protection beyond standard limits
Ranked Top 100 of America's Best Banks 2025 by Forbes
Ranked in S&P Global Top 50 Best Performing Banks in the U.S.
Mobile banking app with remote check deposit, balance tracking, and Zelle integration
Specializes in real estate, construction, and SBA lending for business growth
Remote deposit capture software eliminates need for in-person deposits
Over 30 years of community service and operational track record
cons: Interest rates, APYs, and fee structures not disclosed on homepage or main business pages
Minimum balance requirements and account conditions not specified in available content
Limited information about personal loan products beyond home loans
No details provided on CD rates, savings account options, or promotional offers
Website lacks transparency on specific loan terms, approval timelines, or qualification requirements

contact.address: 601 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90017

best_for: Small business owners seeking real estate, construction, or SBA-backed financing
Homebuyers looking for mortgage products from an established, well-ranked lender
Business customers needing commercial checking and remote deposit capabilities
Depositors prioritizing FDIC protection and expanded insurance coverage
diagnosis: Preferred Bank is best suited for established small business owners, real estate investors, and homebuyers seeking financing from a well-credentialed traditional bank with strong regulatory standing and expanded deposit protection. The main caveat is that specific pricing, rates, fees, and loan terms are not transparent on their website, requiring direct contact to compare competitively against other lenders.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 601 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90017
